headlines: Thirty-four people are killed after a boat carrying migrants from Madagascar to the island of Mayotte sinks.
One person is killed and three others are injured by an apparent gas explosion in Swansea, Wales, United Kingdom.

events.text: Cyclone Freddy kills at least 99 people in Malawi, including 85 people in Blantyre. It is the longest-lived tropical cyclone on record, according to the WMO, having formed on February 4.
Thirty-four people are killed after a boat carrying migrants from Madagascar to the island of Mayotte sinks.
One person is killed and three others are injured by an apparent gas explosion in Swansea, Wales, United Kingdom.
Two people are killed and nine others are injured when a truck strikes a group of pedestrians in Amqui, Quebec, Canada.
Kerisiano Kalolo becomes the new Head of Government of Tokelau.
